name: AliExpress platform qualification pack
change_note: Migrated from script PLATFORM_HINTS into a composable platform pack.
checklist_hints: Check seller identity, brand/IP authorization, category admission, and logistics restrictions.

requirements.requirement: Verify current AliExpress seller identity, brand/IP authorization, category admission, prohibited/restricted products, and logistics constraints.
requirements.decision_effect: Unverified category admission or brand/IP rights prevents approval.
requirements.notes: Seed platform requirement; attach current official policy source before a final decision.

gaps: Seed pack: verify current official AliExpress policy pages per case before final decisions.
